commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6f4d61da72ccdac1e6ad1fa4e5fa9f691780127e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes gateway probe timeout budgeting so configured and explicit remote probes receive the caller timeout, with helper and command regression tests.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +19. Total +22 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main caps non-loopback configRemote probes at 1500ms and passes that budget into probeGateway. I did not run the reporter's live remote WSS environment.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs a narrow contributor or maintainer revision plus external real-environment proof, so it should stay in human PR review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(gateway): honor configured remote probe budgets
target.body:
## Summary
- honor the caller timeout budget for configured remote and explicit remote gateway probes
- keep the shorter ssh tunnel cap unchanged
- cover both the helper budget split and the `gateway probe` command path with regression tests

Fixes #65355.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** `openclaw gateway probe --timeout <n>` still capped `configRemote` probes at `1500ms`, so a healthy remote gateway could false-negative even when the caller supplied a larger budget.

**Real environment tested:** Linux x86_64, Node.js v22.22.0, HEAD `6f4d61da72ccdac1e6ad1fa4e5fa9f691780127e` based on `origin/main` `462e315953`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```bash
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \
    --config test/vitest/vitest.commands.config.ts \
    src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts --reporter=dot
```

**Evidence after fix:**

```
$ OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \
    --config test/vitest/vitest.commands.config.ts \
    src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts --reporter=dot
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  25 passed (25)

$ OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \
    --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts \
    src/commands/gateway-status/helpers.test.ts --reporter=dot
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  17 passed (17)

Total: 2 test files, 42 tests passed
```

**Observed result after fix:** `gateway probe --timeout 15000` now passes the full `15000ms` budget to `configRemote` and `explicit` probe targets. SSH tunnel probes are still capped at `2000ms`.

**What was not tested:** End-to-end `gateway probe` against a live remote gateway. The budget routing is covered by unit tests for both the helper and the command path.
target.author: alix-007
